response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: In the talk intro, manual transcription was done. In the music segment, song lyrics phonetically matched the reference lyrics perfectly. 2. JSON Usage: Fully used for the music segment to maintain absolute textual accuracy. Manual transcription was performed during the first 3 minutes of the video since no lyrics were provided for Miko's talk segment. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles were timed precisely to match vocal cues, avoiding cascading delays during fast lyric segments.

subtitles.original: かわいいでしょう？
subtitles.english: Isn't it cute?

subtitles.original: あのね、まあいつも新衣装で悩んでるんですけど
subtitles.english: You see, I always struggle with deciding on new outfits, but...

subtitles.original: 作りたいなってずっと思ってたんだけど、なかなかね
subtitles.english: I had always wanted to make this, but I couldn't really...

subtitles.original: 踏み切れなかった
subtitles.english: ...take the plunge.

subtitles.original: このルームウェアをね、200万人記念で作らせてもらいました。
subtitles.english: So, I was allowed to make this room wear to celebrate reaching 2 million subscribers!

subtitles.original: いいアイデアだよね、これね？
subtitles.english: It's a great idea, right?

subtitles.original: そして、ちょっと見ていただくんですけど、こちら、じゃじゃーん！
subtitles.english: And, please take a look at this, ta-da!

subtitles.original: ヘアバンド！
subtitles.english: A hairband!

subtitles.original: Mikopiのヘアバンドになってます。
subtitles.english: It's a Mikopi-themed hairband.

subtitles.original: ちょっとふわふわしてる、かわいいし、
subtitles.english: It's fluffy and cute!

subtitles.original: ま、このピンもいっぱい付いてて、イヤリングもかわいくって、
subtitles.english: And it has lots of pins on it, and the earrings are super cute too,

subtitles.original: あとこの、サクランボになってるんですよ、めっちゃネックレス。かわいい！
subtitles.english: and this necklace is shaped like cherries. So cute!

subtitles.original: で、このね、だぼっとした、ニットに、
subtitles.english: And this baggy knit cardigan...

subtitles.original: もうちょっとセクシーなね、ちょっとセクシーな、
subtitles.english: ...with somewhat sexy, a bit sexy...

subtitles.original: ルームウェアとなってます。あの、ちょっとね、
subtitles.english: ...room wear. You see, normally...

subtitles.original: みこちゃん、おへそ見せないんですけど、
subtitles.english: Miko-chan doesn't show her belly button, but...

subtitles.original: おへそが、見えます！
subtitles.english: now you can see my belly button!

subtitles.original: ちょっと、あの、若干、
subtitles.english: It's, well, a little bit...

subtitles.original: 寒くなるとね、食べたくなって若干ぷにってる気もしなくもないけど、
subtitles.english: When it gets cold, I want to eat, so it might be a bit pudgy, but...

subtitles.original: まあ、まあ、まあ、気にしたら負けですからね。
subtitles.english: well, if you worry about it, you lose!

subtitles.original: 大丈夫、健康的な範囲だからね、大丈夫、大丈夫。
subtitles.english: It's fine, it's within a healthy range, so it's totally fine!

subtitles.original: ということで、あのね、隅々までちょっと見ていただきたいんですけど、
subtitles.english: So, I'd like you to check out every little detail, but...

subtitles.original: もっとね、見ていただきたいところがあります。
subtitles.english: there's something else I really want you to see.

subtitles.original: 見て！この、お部屋！かわいい！
subtitles.english: Look at this room! It's so cute!

subtitles.original: 今日のライブはなんと、トナリコさんにね、制作をお願いいたしまして、作ってます！
subtitles.english: For today's live, we actually had Toribal Co. create this room!

subtitles.original: 本当にどうもありがとうございます。めっちゃかわいいの！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much! It's super cute!

subtitles.original: もう本当にね、35Pとかね、このソファとかね、
subtitles.english: They made Mikopi and this sofa,

subtitles.original: もうめちゃくちゃ細かく作っていただいております。この後もね、ちょっとね、
subtitles.english: and everything in such amazing detail. Later on, there will also be...

subtitles.original: びっくりするギミックとかもありますので、お楽しみに！
subtitles.english: ...some surprising gimmicks, so look forward to them!

subtitles.original: じゃあね、あ、そうだ、ハッシュタグだ、ハッシュタグ。
subtitles.english: Now, oh, right! The hashtag, the hashtag!

subtitles.original: ハッシュタグは、こちら！あの、さくらみこ新衣装クリスマスライブでね、
subtitles.english: The hashtag is this one: #さくらみこ新衣装XmasLIVE!

subtitles.original: 応援してください。スクショもたくさん撮ってね。
subtitles.english: Please cheer me on with it. Also, take lots of screenshots!

subtitles.original: ちょっとスクショタイム。はい！
subtitles.english: Time for a quick screenshot session! Here we go!

subtitles.original: てれん！
subtitles.english: Tada!

subtitles.original: あ、かわいい！あ、かわいい！
subtitles.english: Ah, cute! So cute!

subtitles.original: あ、かわいい！かわいい！あ、かわいい！
subtitles.english: Oh, cute! Cute! So cute!

subtitles.original: はい、かわいい！はい、かわいい！
subtitles.english: Yep, cute! Indeed, cute!

subtitles.original: はい、かわいい！
subtitles.english: So cute!

subtitles.original: はい、かわいい！
subtitles.english: Super cute!

subtitles.original: ということでね、みんなたくさん撮ったよね？
subtitles.english: Alright, you all got plenty of shots, right?

subtitles.original: はい、お願いしまーす！
subtitles.english: Yes! Please share them!

subtitles.original: そして、なんと最後に重大告知もありますので、 wagon_icon
subtitles.english: And also, we have a major announcement at the very end,

subtitles.original: 最後までぜひ、お見逃しなく！ありがとう！
subtitles.english: so make sure to watch until the end! Thank you!

subtitles.original: よろしくね！
subtitles.english: Stay tuned!

subtitles.original: それでは、次の曲行きますか！
subtitles.english: Well then, shall we move on to the next song?

subtitles.original: こちらにね、移動させていただきまして、
subtitles.english: Let me just move over here...

subtitles.original: はい！
subtitles.english: Okay!

subtitles.original: それでは、次の曲、行くぞー！
subtitles.english: Alright, here we go with the next song!

subtitles.original: 半端ないぱっぱっぱっぱっぱっぱ（はい）
subtitles.english: So crazy, pappa-pappa-pappa (Yeah!)

subtitles.original: 限界突破ぱっぱっぱっぱっぱっぱ（はい）
subtitles.english: Breaking limits, pappa-pappa-pappa (Yeah!)

subtitles.original: 毎日半端ないぱっぱっぱっぱっぱっぱ（はい）
subtitles.english: Every day is so crazy, pappa-pappa-pappa (Yeah!)

subtitles.original: 限界突破ぱっぱっぱっぱっぱっぱ（はい）
subtitles.english: Breaking limits, pappa-pappa-pappa (Yeah!)

subtitles.original: 明日の私に幸あれ
subtitles.english: May tomorrow bring me happiness!

subtitles.original: 最低温度 uh遮るゴースト
subtitles.english: The lowest temperature, uh, a blocking ghost

subtitles.original: 八百万の嫌な外の要素
subtitles.english: Eight million annoying external factors

subtitles.original: 「何の気ない」と超あっけらかんと
subtitles.english: With a completely casual, carefree look,

subtitles.original: 悪気もなく邪魔するどっかの誰かさんにバイバイ
subtitles.english: say bye-bye to someone getting in the way without any malice!

subtitles.original: 自分時間 堕落タイム確保 17時〜9時は死守マスト
subtitles.english: Securing my personal slacking time, protecting 5 PM to 9 AM is a must!

subtitles.original: さらに愛や恋や甘いも忘れずに
subtitles.english: And also not forgetting love, romance, and sweet treats...

subtitles.original: とどのつまり
subtitles.english: To sum it up...

subtitles.original: オーバーワークは立ち入り禁止ですよって注意喚起もしてますよ
subtitles.english: Overwork is strictly off-limits, I'm issuing a warning here!

subtitles.original: ねえ楽して苦なくして生きてくって難しいな
subtitles.english: Hey, living easily without any struggles is so hard, isn't it?

subtitles.original: だって「安定」「裏技」「一夜漬け」甘い蜜には罠がある保存
subtitles.english: Because in sweet honey like 'stability', 'cheats', and 'cramming', there's always a trap!

subtitles.original: やっ！
subtitles.english: Yah!

subtitles.original: 眠くなったら寝る
subtitles.english: Sleep when you get sleepy

subtitles.original: お昼過ぎに起きる
subtitles.english: Wake up after noon

subtitles.original: 遊びたくて遊ぶ
subtitles.english: Play because you want to play

subtitles.original: お腹減ったらご飯を食べる
subtitles.english: Eat when you get hungry

subtitles.original: 嬉しかったら笑う
subtitles.english: Laugh when you are happy

subtitles.original: 悲しかったら泣いてもいいんじゃない
subtitles.english: And if you are sad, it's fine to cry, isn't it?

subtitles.original: 明日の私のために今日もなんとか頑張るのさ
subtitles.english: For the sake of my tomorrow, I'll somehow do my best today

subtitles.original: 明日も頑張らなくていいように頑張るのさ
subtitles.english: Doing my best today so I don't have to do my best tomorrow!

subtitles.original: 退屈じゃないやこれ多分そう
subtitles.english: It's not boring, I think that's probably right

subtitles.original: だなんやでやることやっています！
subtitles.english: I'm somehow getting things done anyway!

subtitles.original: WHAT? AND BUT
subtitles.english: WHAT? AND BUT

subtitles.original: 誰に知られなくたって別にいいから
subtitles.english: It doesn't matter if nobody knows!

subtitles.original: 私には私のマイルール
subtitles.english: I've got my own personal rules

subtitles.original: 明日ラクするためにはハイチーズ
subtitles.english: Say 'Cheese!' to make tomorrow easier

subtitles.original: 意外とこんな感じでラブアンドピースのある毎日を生きたいのです
subtitles.english: Surprisingly, I just want to live each day with love and peace like this!

subtitles.original: Don't be Don't be Don't be shy
subtitles.english: Don't be, don't be, don't be shy

subtitles.original: ドドキドキしときたい
subtitles.english: I want to feel my heart pounding

subtitles.original: Let Let Let me shine
subtitles.english: Let, let, let me shine

subtitles.original: 明日天気になれ
subtitles.english: Hope it's sunny tomorrow!

subtitles.original: To To To be excite
subtitles.english: To, to, to be excited

subtitles.original: 心もっと踊りたい
subtitles.english: I want my heart to dance even more

subtitles.original: Sunday Monday Tuesday Wednesday
subtitles.english: Sunday, Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday

subtitles.original: 木金土日月
subtitles.english: Thursday, Friday, Saturday, Sunday, Monday!

subtitles.original: 辛くなったら歌う
subtitles.english: Sing when it gets tough

subtitles.original: むかついたら愚痴る
subtitles.english: Grumble when you get annoyed

subtitles.original: やりたいようにやる
subtitles.english: Just do whatever you want

subtitles.original: それができたら苦労しないわ
subtitles.english: But it wouldn't be a struggle if I could do that!

subtitles.original: 常に一喜一憂
subtitles.english: Constantly swinging between joy and sorrow
